items.headline: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Stock Weighed Against Cash Flow Value After Steady 2024 Run
items.summary: Wondering if Colgate-Palmolive is fairly priced or if the market is overlooking something at the current US$89.48 share price? This article focuses on what the numbers say about value rather than headlines. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 0.1% move over the last 7 days and a 0.6% decline over the last 30 days, while posting a 15.2% return year to date and a 4.0% return over the past year. items.headline: U.S.-Iran talks postponed; oil on pace for weekly decline  - what’s moving markets
items.summary: Investing.com - U.S. stock futures edge lower after a strong rally on Wall Street driven by hopes that a U.S.-Iran peace deal could hold. Oil prices continue to retreat as traders bet the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz will help restore global crude supplies, although the abrupt cancellation of planned U.S.-Iran nuclear talks is raising questions about the durability of the agreement.

items.headline: OPEC keeps oil demand growth forecast, sees no peak ahead
items.summary: Investing.com -- OPEC maintained its projection for strong global oil demand growth through 2030 and raised its longer-term outlook on Thursday, pointing to policy changes worldwide that favor oil consumption.
